zh.lifeSummary: 當Dionese Bowerman於1506年出生在英國英格蘭戴文時，她的父親John Bourman35歲，母親Elizabeth Ann Russell31歲。她於1523年5月與William Bond在英國戴文結婚。他們至少是7個兒子和7個女兒的父母。她去世於1560年2月18日在她的家鄉享年54歲，埋葬在英國多瑟特斯普爾。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Dionese Bowerman于1506年出生在英国英格兰戴文时，她的父亲John Bourman35岁，母亲Elizabeth Ann Russell31岁。她于1523年5月与William Bond在英国戴文结婚。他们至少是7个儿子和7个女儿的父母。她去世于1560年2月18日在她的家乡享年54岁，埋葬在英国多瑟特斯普爾。

nameMeanings.name: Bowerman
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: occupational name from Middle English bureman, meaing either ‘chamberer, personal servant’ or ‘cottager’. See Bower 1.
Americanized form of German Bauermann, a variant of Bauer .

variants.name: Bower
meanings: English: from Middle English bour, bor(e), bur(e) (Old English būr) ‘cottage, chamber, bower’, denoting either a ‘cottager’ or ‘chamber-servant’, or a topographic name for someone who lived in a small cottage, or a habitational name from any of various minor places called from this word in Somerset, Sussex, Essex, and Peeblesshire. Compare Bowerman and Bowring .
English: variant of Bowyer , for a maker or seller of bows or an archer, from Middle English bowyere, an agent derivative of Old English boga ‘bow’.
Americanized form of German   Bauer   ‘peasant’ or ‘neighbor, fellow citizen’, or of its Dutch cognate   Bouwer  .

variants.name: Barrowman
meanings: English and Scottish (Lanarkshire): variant of   Bowerman  .

variants.name: Boarman
meanings: Perhaps also an altered form of German   Bormann  .

historicEvents.title: Book of Common Prayer
historicEvents.description: Book of Common Prayer, a product of the English Reformation, was published in 1549 for assistance in the administration of the sacraments and other rites and ceremonies of the church according to the use of the Church of England. The book outlined morning, evening, and communion prayers and orders for baptism and marriage, thus making England a truly Protestant state.

historicEvents.title: Act of Uniformity
historicEvents.description: The Act of Uniformity was passed by the Parliament of England and required all people to go to church once a week. The consequence of not attending church was a fine of 12 pence, which was a considerable amount for a poor person.

en.lifeSummary: When Dionese Bowerman was born in 1506, in Devon, England, United Kingdom, her father, John Bourman, was 35 and her mother, Elizabeth Ann Russell, was 31. She married William Bond in May 1523, in Devon, England. They were the parents of at least 7 sons and 7 daughters. She died on 18 February 1560, in her hometown, at the age of 54, and was buried in Steeple, Dorset, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Dionese Bowerman est née en 1506, à Devon, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, John Bourman, avait 35 ans et sa mère, Elizabeth Ann Russell, avait 31 ans. Elle a épousé William Bond en mai 1523, à Devon, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 7 fils et 7 filles. Elle est décédée le 18 février 1560, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 54 ans, et a été enterrée à Steeple, Dorset, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Dionese Bowerman 1506 in Devon, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war ihr Vater John Bourman 35 und ihre Mutter Elizabeth Ann Russell 31. Sie hat im Mai 1523 in Devon, England William Bond geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 7 Söhne und 7 Töchter. Sie starb am 18. Februar 1560 im Alter von 54 Jahren in ihrem Geburtsort und wurde in Steeple, Dorset, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Dionese Bowerman è nata il nel 1506 nel Devon, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, sua padre, John Bourman, aveva 35 anni e sua madre, Elizabeth Ann Russell, aveva 31 anni. Lei sposato William Bond nel maggio 1523, nel Devon, England. Erano genitori di almeno 7 figli e 7 figlie. Morì il 18 febbraio 1560, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 54 anni, e fu sepolta a Steeple, Dorset, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Dionese Bowermanが1506年にイギリスイギリスデボンで生まれた時，父John Bourmanは35歳，母Elizabeth Ann Russellは31歳であった。1523年5月にイギリスデボンでWilliam Bondと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも7人の息子と7人の娘の親であった。彼女は1560年2月18日に故郷で54歳で死去し，イギリスドールセトスティープルにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Dionese Bowerman(이)가 1506년 영국 잉글랜드 데폰에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 John Bourman(은)는 35세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Elizabeth Ann Russell(은)는 31세였다. 그녀는 1523년 5월 영국 데폰에서 William Bond(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 일곱 명의 아들과 일곱 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1560년 2월 18일 그녀의 고향에서 54세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 도르세트 스티플에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Dionese Bowerman nasceu em 1506, em Devon, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, John Bourman, tinha 35 anos e sua mãe, Elizabeth Ann Russell, tinha 31 anos. Ela casou-se com William Bond em maio de 1523, em Devon, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 7 filhos e 7 filhas. Ela faleceu em 18 de fevereiro de 1560, em sua cidade natal, com 54 anos, e foi sepultada em Steeple, Dorset, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Dionese Bowerman родилась в 1506 г. в местности девон, Англия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени John Bourman было 35 лет, а матери, которую звали Elizabeth Ann Russell, 31. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени William Bond май 1523 г. в местности девон, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 7 сыновей и 7 дочерей. Она умерла 18 февраля 1560 г. в её родном городе в возрасте 54 лет и была похоронена в местности стипл, дорсет, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Dionese Bowerman nació en 1506, en Devon, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, John Bourman, tenía 35 años y su mamá, Elizabeth Ann Russell, tenía 31 años. Se casó con William Bond en mayo de 1523, en Devon, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 7 hijos y 7 hijas. Murió el 18 de febrero de 1560, en su pueblo, a la edad de 54 años, y fue sepultada en Steeple, Dorset, Inglaterra.
